ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ),CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Maintenance_Status__c))),NOT(ISBLANK(ALD_Sat_Id__c)),OR(AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Maintenance_Status__c, 'STATE_NEW')), OR(ISCHANGED(Subject), ISCHANGED(External_Case_Category__c), ISCHANGED(Vehicle_No__c), ISCHANGED(Vin_No_Contract__c), ISCHANGED(Appointment_Date_Time_Option1__c), ISCHANGED(Appointment_Date_Time_Option2__c), ISCHANGED(Appointment_Date_Time_Option3__c), ISCHANGED(Preferred_Supplier__c), ISCHANGED(Mileage__c))), AND (ISPICKVAL(Maintenance_Status__c, 'STATE_CLOSED'),OR(ISCHANGED(External_Case_Category__c),ISCHANGED(External_Case_Detail__c)))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Case is synced and is awaiting update from ALD Sat. Hence, below values cannot be updated after the appointment is confirmed. Case Category,Subject, Contract Information, Appointment Date/Time (Option 1,2,3),Preferred Supplier, Mileage
